entryPath: Select a project from the landing page
Open the top-right account switcher if needed
Use the 校审 ribbon entries: 开始校审 / 待审核 / 复审任务 / 我的编校审
frictions: Headless browser sessions are not suitable for WebGL2 viewer validation, but list/detail navigation is reachable.
Current backend user identity (`debug-user`) does not align with the seeded designer alias (`designer_001`) expected by the returned-task validation path.
blockers: Seed at least one task visible to the local designer identity with canonical returned semantics: either `status=rejected` or `currentNode=sj` + `status=draft` + return metadata/history.
Seed at least one reviewer-returned workflow record that reappears in designer returned-task surfaces under the same task id.
